name: etoro-api
description: Credential-safe eToro Public API CLI and Codex skills for portfolio decision trees, market data, and approval-gated trading execution.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze portfolios and prepare eToro trades.
interface.longDescription: A local eToro Public API integration for Codex. It provides a credential-safe CLI for identity, portfolio, PnL, trade history, instrument lookup, prices, candles, snapshots, portfolio decision trees, and approval-gated trading execution while keeping API credentials in local config or environment variables outside model context.
defaultPrompt: Use $portfolio-decision-tree to build a fee-aware trade decision tree.
